Button.description: Primary interactive trigger. Always full-rounded pill shape. Min 44px height.
rules: Primary: bg-[#0669F7] text-white, one per view
Outline: border border-[#DDDDDD] text-[#25282A], hover border-[#0669F7]
Loading state: show spinner, disable pointer-events
Size sm: text-sm px-4 py-2, md: text-base px-5 py-3, lg: text-xl px-6 py-4

TextField.description: Input field for user text entry. Filled variant is default.
rules: Filled: bg-[#F2F4F5] rounded border border-transparent, focus border-[#0669F7]
Outlined: bg-white border border-[#DDDDDD] rounded, focus border-[#0669F7]
Error: border-[#ED1C24], show error message in text-[#ED1C24] below
Always show label above input (never placeholder-only)

Card.description: Container for grouped content. Default padding 16px mobile, 24px desktop.
rules: Clickable cards: block with cursor-pointer and press-effect

BottomSheet.description: Slide-up overlay for actions, forms, selections on mobile. Becomes modal on desktop.
rules: Mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0, max-h-[90vh], rounded-t-3xl, bg-white
Always includes drag handle bar at top (mobile)
Standard: content height auto, Modal: fixed height, Expanded: 90vh
Dismiss on backdrop tap or swipe down

Tabs.description: Content segmentation. Fixed for 4 or fewer items, scrollable for 5+.
rules: Tab bar: border-b border-[#EFF1F5], sticky to top on mobile
Badge: small number or dot on tab when needed

Popup.description: Interrupting overlay requiring user decision. Use sparingly.
rules: Backdrop: rgba(0,0,0,0.4), tap outside to dismiss (except Alert)
Primary action: full-width or right-aligned button

Menu.description: Contextual action list anchored to a trigger.
rules: Each item: min-h-[44px] px-4, text-sm text-[#25282A]
Mobile: collapse into BottomSheet action list

Chips.description: Compact interactive labels for filtering, input, or suggestions.
rules: Filter unselected: border border-[#DDDDDD] bg-white text-[#25282A]
Min tap target: ensure 44px via vertical margin if chip is 32px

Badge.description: Small count or status indicator on icons or avatars.
rules: Dot: 8px circle, absolute positioned top-right of parent
Number: min-w-[18px] h-[18px] rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold
Color: bg-[#ED1C24] text-white (default), bg-[#0669F7] for info

Tag.description: Non-interactive label for categorization or status display.
rules: Height: 24px, padding: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
Thumb: w-5 h-5 bg-white rounded-full shadow translate-x with transition
Min tap target: wrap in element with min-h-[44px]

Selection.description: Checkbox, Radio, and Checklist for single/multiple selection.

Indicator.description: Progress feedback for loading or completion states.
rules: Linear: h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#EFF1F5], fill bg-[#0669F7]
Circular: svg with strokeDasharray, color stroke-[#0669F7]
Progress: shows percentage label if determinate
Indeterminate: animate-pulse or continuous sweep animation

Calendar.description: Date selection control. Inline or within DatePicker.
rules: Desktop: popup anchored to input, max-w-[320px]

Tooltip.mobileFallback: inline label or help icon with tap-reveal
Tooltip.description: Contextual information on hover. Desktop only — mobile shows inline.
rules: bg-[#25282A] text-white text-xs px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded max-w-[200px]
Mobile: do not render tooltip, show label inline or on tap
Never put interactive content inside tooltip

GNB.description: Global Navigation Bar. Adapts layout and content by screen size.
rules: Fixed top, z-50, bg-white border-b border-[#EFF1F5]
Desktop: logo left, nav center, actions right
Mobile: logo or back-button left, title center, action right

TopAppBar.description: Screen-level navigation bar for sub-pages on mobile. Desktop uses GNB.
rules: Fixed top, h-[56px], bg-white border-b border-[#EFF1F5]
Back button: 36px icon button, tap area min 44px
Title: Title 02 text-[#25282A] centered on mobile

BottomTabBar.description: Primary navigation on mobile. Desktop uses sidebar or GNB nav.
rules: Active indicator: bg-[#E6F0FE] rounded-2xl behind icon

Snackbar.description: Brief feedback message. Auto-dismisses after 4s. Error persists.
rules: Position: fixed bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2, or bottom-[calc(var(--tab-bar-height)+8px)] on mobile
bg-[#25282A] text-white px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl shadow-md
Auto-dismiss: 4000ms (info/success), manual dismiss only for error
Animate in: slide up + fade, animate out: fade

FAB.description: Floating Action Button. Primary screen CTA on mobile.
rules: Regular: w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-[#0669F7] text-white shadow-lg
Extended: h-14 px-6 rounded-full with label + icon
Desktop: use standard Button in page header instead
WithLabel: flex items-center gap-3, line + text-xs text-[#98A2B2] + line
Never use heavy dividers — always light (#EFF1F5) or medium (#DDDDDD)

SegmentedControl.description: Mutually exclusive option selection. Alternative to Tabs for 2–4 options.
rules: Segment: flex-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-full transition-all

TableOfContents.description: Sticky navigation for long-form content or multi-section pages.
rules: Desktop: sticky left sidebar, text-sm text-[#7A7B7A]
Mobile: use horizontal scrollable tab bar instead
